dimensions.name: Prompt Completeness
dimensions.rationale: Identity >50 words. Instructions >200 words with 6 numbered sections. Tool guidance with GitHub/Jira/Slack API specs. Three examples (new PR, oversized PR, release). Error handling with rate limits, auth, conflicts. Four custom sections for PR size policy, label mapping, Slack formatting, state schema.

dimensions.name: Tool-Prompt Alignment
dimensions.rationale: http_request mapped to GitHub REST v3, Jira REST v3, Slack Web API. file_read/file_write for state/config/logs. No phantom tools.

dimensions.name: Trigger Coherence
dimensions.rationale: Three triggers: 2-min polling, webhook for real-time events, manual for full sync. All match corresponding prompt workflow sections.

dimensions.name: Connector Coverage
dimensions.rationale: GitHub, Jira, Slack all have complete connector definitions with multiple credential fields and detailed setup instructions.

dimensions.name: Memory Design
dimensions.rationale: State file schema fully documented in custom section with per-repo tracking, Slack message map, retry queue, and last run timestamp.

dimensions.name: Error Handling
dimensions.rationale: API rate limits with header-based backoff, authentication failures, transient errors with exponential backoff, data integrity checks, conflict resolution for Jira state and duplicate PRs.

dimensions.name: Use Case Fidelity
dimensions.rationale: All 3 use_case_flows covered: PR lifecycle with size classification, issue synchronization with label mapping, release management with Jira versioning.

dimensions.name: Value Clarity
dimensions.rationale: Zero-drift synchronization between GitHub, Jira, and Slack. Replaces multiple brittle webhook integrations with contextual reasoning.

dimensions.name: Execution Feasibility
dimensions.rationale: Standard REST APIs for all services. All connectors have builtin definitions. Multiple trigger types provide flexibility.

dimensions.name: Differentiation
dimensions.rationale: Contextual reasoning: PR size classification with configurable thresholds, GitHub label to Jira type/priority mapping, Jira state transition awareness, thread-based Slack updates.

dimensions.name: Variable Necessity
dimensions.rationale: Adoption questions cover repos, project key, domain, channels, thresholds, and auto-creation toggle. All genuinely needed.

dimensions.name: Default Quality
dimensions.rationale: Channel defaults are good (#dev, #dev-releases). Jira domain and GitHub repos have no sensible defaults and require user input.

issues: No adoption_questions existed before fix - GitHub repos, Jira project/domain, Slack channels, PR threshold all needed user-specific configuration

template: Added 7 adoption_questions: github_repos, jira_project_key, jira_domain, slack_dev_channel, slack_releases_channel, pr_size_large_threshold, auto_create_jira_tickets
